ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the archival series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the series */,
  "finding_aid_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if a finding aid is available for the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator responsible for the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microfilms" (
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microfilm reel */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series this reel belongs to */,
  "reel_numbers" TEXT /* Range of reel numbers associated with the document */,
  "file_description_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if file-level descriptions are available */,
  "microfilm_number_text" TEXT /* Microfilm numbers in the textual database */,
  "microfilm_number_finding_aid" TEXT /* Microfilm numbers listed in the finding aid, if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the microfilm record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the microfilm record */,
  "digitization_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the microfilm has been digitized */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Text to describe the physical condition of the microfilm */,
  "digitization_date" TEXT /* Date when the microfilm was digitized, if applicable */,
  "digitized_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator who digitized the microfilm */,
  "access_restrictions" TEXT /* Text to describe any access restrictions on the microfilm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microfilms_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microfilms_digitized_by FOREIGN KEY ("digitized_by") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finding_aids" (
  "finding_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding aid */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series this finding aid belongs to */,
  "aid_description" TEXT /* Description of the finding aid contents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the finding aid was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the finding aid */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the digital file of the finding aid */,
  "digitized_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator who digitized the finding aid */,
  "access_restrictions" TEXT /* Text to describe any access restrictions on the finding aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finding_aids_digitized_by FOREIGN KEY ("digitized_by") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finding_aids_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., archivist, researcher, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the materials */,
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microfilm reel being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reel_id FOREIGN KEY ("reel_id") REFERENCES microfilms ("reel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series this metadata is associated with */,
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microfilm reel this metadata pertains to */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata related to archival series and reels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., description, notes, tags) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., curator, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_reel_id FOREIGN KEY ("reel_id") REFERENCES microfilms ("reel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curators" (
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curator */,
  "curator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the curator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the curator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the curator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the curator record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curator_id")
)
